case_title: LEASECOM CORPORATION VS. DENNIS WHITESTONE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-14-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-05-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
